cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: On-device LLM for cybersecurity triage and incident reporting for African SMEs with no reliable cloud access.

test_prompts.prompt: You are a cybersecurity analyst assistant. Summarize the following IDS alert into a one-paragraph executive brief for a non-technical SME manager: ALERT: Port scan detected from 192.168.1.45 targeting ports 22, 80, 443, 3306 over 5 minutes. Severity: Medium.

Draft a short incident response memo for a small Nigerian fintech company that discovered unauthorized login attempts on their admin portal from an overseas IP address. Include three recommended immediate actions.
